= User endpoints in the Accounts REST API



+++<fieldset>+++The user component represents the end user in the BlueXP platform. Every user is associated with an account and a workspace.

Each user is defined through the following configuration information:

* A unique identifier generated by the system at creation
* A public visible identifier
* An authorization (auth0) identifier

The following actions can be performed with the user endpoints:

* Retrieve users authorized for actions on a particular resource
* Retrieve users authorized for actions across all resources+++</fieldset>+++
